description: Steps 5-6: API Service Layer (6 services with dual mock/real) + Auth Store Refactoring. Each service checks VITE_USE_MOCK and routes to mock or real HTTP. Auth store is refactored to use authService.
steps: Create `src/services/authService.ts`: login(username, password) -> Promise<LoginResponse>. If VITE_USE_MOCK, call mock.authLogin; else POST /api/auth/login via request.

Create `src/services/productService.ts`: getList(params) -> Promise<PageResult<Product>>, getById(id) -> Promise<Product>, create(data) -> Promise<Product>, update(data) -> Promise<Product>, delete(id) -> Promise<void>, updateStatus(id, status) -> Promise<void>, batchUpdateStatus(ids[], status) -> Promise<void>. Dual mock/real.

Create `src/services/categoryService.ts`: getPublicList() -> Promise<Category[]>, getList() -> Promise<Category[]>, create(data) -> Promise<Category>, update(data) -> Promise<Category>, delete(id) -> Promise<void>. Dual mock/real.

Create `src/services/orderService.ts`: create(data) -> Promise<Order>, getMyOrders(params) -> Promise<PageResult<Order>>, getById(id) -> Promise<Order>, getAllOrders(params) -> Promise<PageResult<Order>>, updateStatus(id, status) -> Promise<void>. Dual mock/real.

Create `src/services/pointsService.ts`: getBalance() -> Promise<PointsBalance>, getTransactions(params) -> Promise<PageResult<PointsTransaction>>, grant(data) -> Promise<void>, deduct(data) -> Promise<void>, getAccounts(params) -> Promise<PageResult<PointsAccount>>. Dual mock/real.
Create `src/services/userService.ts`: getProfile() -> Promise<UserInfo>, create(data) -> Promise<UserInfo>, getList(params) -> Promise<PageResult<UserInfo>>. Dual mock/real.

Refactor `src/store/useAuthStore.ts`: Remove MOCK_USERS, remove old UserInfo/UserRole types (use from src/types). Import and call authService.login(). Store token in localStorage('token'). Keep Zustand persist for user. Add token field to state. Update UserInfo to match src/types (id, email, avatarUrl, status). Export UserRole type re-export from types.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 service files exist with correct signatures matching business-logic-model.md
Each service method checks import.meta.env.VITE_USE_MOCK and routes accordingly
useAuthStore no longer has MOCK_USERS, calls authService.login instead
useAuthStore stores token in localStorage and user info via persist
`npm run build` passes with no type errors
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm exit code 0
findings: EmployeeLayout previously used user?.points which does not exist on the new UserInfo type. Replaced with hardcoded 0 and removed the unused useAuthStore import from EmployeeLayout. Points display should be wired to pointsService.getBalance() in a later feature (FEAT-007). The UserRole type is re-exported from useAuthStore so AuthGuard import continues to work.
